mechanism: Broad kinase inhibitor with off‑target FLT3 activity
additional_notes: Heterogeneous effects in AML; recommended top conc 1 µM.

mechanism: Inhibits BCL‑2 and BCL‑xL (BH3 mimetic) to induce apoptosis
additional_notes: Also known as ABT‑263; useful comparator to venetoclax; top conc 1 µM.

mechanism: Inhibits CDKs (notably CDK9) affecting transcriptional regulation
additional_notes: Also called Flavopiridol; targets transcriptional addiction in AML; recommended top conc 1 µM.

mechanism: Selective inhibition of CDK4 and CDK6 to induce cell‑cycle arrest
additional_notes: May affect AML proliferation in subsets; recommended top conc 10 µM.
Also LBH589; active in AML models and combinations; top conc 1 µM.

mechanism: Inhibits 20S proteasome leading to accumulation of misfolded proteins and apoptosis
additional_notes: Proteasome inhibition can be cytotoxic in AML; recommended top conc 1 µM.

mechanism: Covalent inhibitor of BTK and additional kinases
additional_notes: Some AML subtypes show sensitivity; useful for testing combinations; recommended top conc 10 µM.

mechanism: Inhibits BET family (BRD2/3/4) to disrupt oncogenic transcription programs
additional_notes: Also known as MK‑8628; investigational BET inhibitor active in AML preclinical models; top conc 1 µM.
